per_iteration.description: Baseline - unmodified copy of original skill
Removed template script references, made SKILL.md self-contained with inline code examples, added analysis section with header-based column mapping
Added explicit column-name mapping, emphasized 'highest category = highest total spend' and 'approval_rate as number like 75'
Switched to data_only=False, added isinstance checks for Amount, explicit True check for Approved
Fixed row filtering: skip TOTAL/SUM/AVERAGE summary rows and rows with formula strings, preventing off-by-one in approval_rate calculation

changes_summary: Removed Bundled Template Script section that caused model to loop searching for files at wrong paths
Made SKILL.md fully self-contained with inline creation and analysis code examples
Added explicit header-based column mapping for reading spreadsheets
Added summary row filtering (TOTAL, SUM, AVERAGE) to prevent data corruption
Added formula string detection to skip rows containing =SUM(), =AVERAGE() etc.
Emphasized 'highest category = highest total spend' and approval_rate format
